'''Shrivel Braittrand''', a [[Kulless]] from [[Gerres Gule]], moved from his home [[Planet/Legends|planet]] to seek employment as a [[Podracing/Legends|race]] mechanic. He was hired by [[Boles Roor/Legends|Boles Roor]], [[Glimmik/Legends|glimmik]] singer and two-time winner of the [[Boonta Eve Classic/Legends|Boonta Eve Classic]]. After Roor's loss in the Boonta race, he quit Podracing and gave his pod to Braittrand, who modified it into the ''[[Kulless Squall]]'' and embarked on a quite successful racing career. He was one of the few [[Podracer (profession)/Legends|Podracing pilots]] not to meet his end during a race.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Racer Revenge]]'' {{1st}}
